title: Jaylen Brown, Jayson Tatum dynamic shines in Celtics win over Cavaliers: 7 takeaways
author: Tom Westerholm
bullets: Jaylen Brown scored 23 points, helping the Celtics win 109-98 against the Cavaliers in Cleveland.
Jayson Tatum, still recovering, contributed 20 points in his second game after returning from injury.
Celtics' strong defense limited Cavaliers to one made shot in 20 attempts, resulting in a low-scoring second quarter.

title: Former Patriots WR cautions against signing Alec Pierce to a hefty contract
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: The Patriots consider signing Colts' wideout Alec Pierce as a potential top target for quarterback Drake Maye.
ESPN's Jeremy Fowler estimates Pierce could command at least $27 million annually in his free-agent deal.
Former Patriots WR Chris Hogan cautions against overpaying, citing concerns over Pierce's route versatility.

title: North Kingstown, R.I. police officer dies by suicide, department says
author: Molly Farrar
bullets: North Kingstown Police Department announced Officer Brittany Dougal died by suicide on March 4 after battling mental illness.
Dougal, 29, was a new officer from Cranston, trained at Rhode Island Municipal Police Training Academy, previously worked at McLean Hospital.
Funeral arrangements in Danvers request donations to North Kingstown Animal Shelter and Tunnel to Towers Foundation in her memory.

title: 9 under-the-radar players for Patriots to consider in free agency
author: Conor Roche
bullets: The Patriots have roughly $60 million to spend in free agency ahead of the legal tampering period starting Monday.
Potential Patriots targets include Vikings' WR Jalen Nailor and Browns' LB Devin Bush, known for his strong defensive performance.
Teven Jenkins from the Browns could bolster the Patriots' offensive line if higher-profile guard options are not available.

title: Did Tom Brady prevent Patriots from acquiring Maxx Crosby? One report suggests possibility.
author: Conor Roche
bullets: Tom Brady, a Raiders minority owner, reportedly affected a potential trade involving Patriots acquiring Maxx Crosby.
The Raiders traded Maxx Crosby to the Ravens for two first-round picks, including the 14th pick in the 2026 draft.
Reports suggest tension between Brady and the Patriots, despite previous honors and his involvement with Raiders' operations.

title: Rumored Patriots target Alec Pierce reportedly expected to make at least $27M per year, might not hit free agency
author: Conor Roche
bullets: Alec Pierce, Colts wide receiver, is expected to command at least $27 million annually in free agency.
The Colts are negotiating with Pierce to re-sign before the legal tampering period starts.
Pierce had 47 receptions, 1,003 yards, and six touchdowns last season, leading NFL in yards per reception.

title: ‘Reading felt impossible’: Why she’s running the Boston Marathon for BPL
author: Annie Jonas
bullets: Marguerite Flynn, from Hingham, is running the 2026 Boston Marathon to support the Boston Public Library.
Flynn, 30, faced academic challenges growing up with dyslexia and ADHD, finding solace in libraries.
Despite a rare vascular condition and multiple leg surgeries, Flynn is determined to complete the marathon.

title: She’s running the 2026 Boston Marathon for her patient
author: Annie Jonas
bullets: Amy Comander, 51, from Newton, will run her 13th Boston Marathon on April 20, 2026.
Comander is running in honor of her patient Christina, currently undergoing advanced breast cancer treatment.
The run supports the Ellie Fund, aiding breast cancer patients with services like transportation and meal preparation.

title: Here’s why a trade for Brian Thomas Jr. would be a home run move for the Patriots
author: Colin McCarthy
bullets: The Patriots are considering a trade for Jaguars receiver Brian Thomas Jr., who has two years left on his rookie contract.
Thomas posted over 1,300 scrimmage yards and 10 touchdowns in 2024 but struggled in his sophomore NFL season.
Acquiring Thomas would be low-cost for the Patriots, allowing flexibility to enhance other positions in their roster.

title: ‘SNL’ recap: Best moments from Ryan Gosling hosting ‘Saturday Night Live’
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: Ryan Gosling hosted the March 7 episode of 'Saturday Night Live,' marking his fourth time as host.
Gosling's episode featured sketches like 'Otezla' and 'Passing Notes' with cast laughter interruptions.
Gorillaz performed 'Clint Eastwood' on SNL, celebrating their 25th anniversary and upcoming album.
